description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs, build and build-alpine, both running on ubuntu-22.04. The build job uses a matrix strategy to test with Node.js 14.x, 16.x, and 18.x, while the build-alpine job uses a similar matrix but runs in an alpine container with the corresponding Node.js version. In each job, check out the code, install dependencies, and run npm test.
